title: hedlundia neopinnatifida
intro: Hedlundia neopinnatifida is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Hedlundia neopinnatifida is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hedlundia neopinnatifida can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, and topical creams.
